advisory.heading: Qonda ukuhlola kwakho ijubane
advisory.downloadOverTime: **Ijubane lokulanda ngokuhamba kwesikhathi:** Libonisa ukuqina koxhumo
advisory.uploadOverTime: **Ijubane lokulayisha ngokuhamba kwesikhathi:** Likala ukusebenza kokulayisha
advisory.appLatency: **I-latency ye-App:** Lilandelela ukuthi idivayisi yakho ifinyelela ngokushesha kangakanani le sevisi ngesikhathi sokuhlola

aiSummary.heading: Isifinyezo esinamandla e-AI
aiSummary.placeholder: Isifinyezo sakho sokuhlola ijubane sizovela lapha ngemuva kokuthi uhlelo luhumushe imiphumela.

howToUse.heading: Hlola ijubane lenethiwekhi yakho lamanje
howToUse.currentDevice: Ungagijima ukuhlola ijubane kusuka kudivayisi yakho nokuxhumana kwakho kwamanje. Uma use-Wi-Fi wasekhaya, imiphumela ibonisa isipiliyoni sakho sangempela manje.
howToUse.deviceToServer: Ilala ukusebenza kwedivayisi kuseva, hhayi ukuhlolwa okujulile kwe-router yakho, amandla esiginali, noma yonke imininingwane yangaphakathi ye-Wi-Fi.
howToUse.signedIn: Manje njengoba ungenile, ungakhohlwa ukubheka amagrafu akho okuhlola nomlando ngezansi!
howToUse.signedOut: **Ngena ngemvume** noma **Bhalisa** ukuze uthole imininingwane eningiliziwe mayelana nokusebenza kwenethiwekhi yakho!

latencyNote.title: Indlela i-latency elinganiswa ngayo
latencyNote.desc1: Izicelo ezisheshayo ze-app zithunyelwa kule sevisi ukuze kulinganiswe ukusabela kwedivayisi yakho nenethiwekhi yakho yamanje.
latencyNote.desc2: Lokhu kuwusizo ekusebenzeni kwangempela kokuphesha, kodwa akufani ne-ICMP ping yakudala.
